title: Polystichum yaeyamense
taxonomy: Polystichum yaeyamense is classified under the kingdom Plantae, with its more specific classification being in the division Pteridophyta, the class Polypodiopsida, the order Polypodiales, the family Dryopteridaceae, and the genus Polystichum. This species is a type of evergreen fern native to Japan. The classification of Polystichum yaeyamense reflects its evolutionary history and distinct characteristics within the plant kingdom. The genus Polystichum contains several other species of ferns that share similar traits with Polystichum yaeyamense. Understanding the classification of Polystichum yaeyamense is essential for botanists and researchers studying plant diversity and evolution.
